goal: 修复 sync 对非 origin remote 的硬编码读取

summary.title: Honor configured remote during sync
summary.what: Updated sync to construct actor-log fetch refs, actor-log scan prefixes, and synced main refs from the configured Mainline remote instead of the literal origin remote. Added a regression test that seeds an upstream-only actor log and a divergent local main, then verifies sync reads upstream tracking refs.
summary.why: Repositories can use non-default remote names such as upstream in fork, GitLab, and enterprise setups. The config already exposed [mainline] remote, but sync still read refs/remotes/origin in several places, which could hide teammate intents or use the wrong main head.
summary.user_goal: 修复 sync 对非 origin remote 的硬编码读取

decisions.chose: Use s.remoteName() for sync fetch refspecs, actor log scanning, and synced main ref lookup.
decisions.rationale: This keeps default origin behavior unchanged while making the existing remote config effective across the read path.
rejected: Only fixing the fetch refspec while leaving view rebuild hardcoded to origin

decisions.chose: Add an engine test that deletes the local actor ref, fetches from upstream, and makes local main diverge from upstream/main.
decisions.rationale: The test fails on both old failure modes: missing non-origin actor logs and choosing local main because origin/main is absent.

risks: Seal was prepared with a pre-existing untracked .mainline/hub/ directory, so the seal audit marks evidence_complete=false even though the committed code diff is limited to sync.go and setup_test.go.

anti_patterns.what: Hard-coding refs/remotes/origin in sync, context, coverage, or status paths
anti_patterns.why: Mainline exposes [mainline] remote for teams whose canonical remote is not origin; hard-coded origin reads stale or missing remote-tracking refs in those workflows.

architectural_claims: Configured Mainline remote is the source of truth for remote-tracking refs used by sync and view rebuild.
behavioral_changes: sync fetches actor logs into refs/remotes/<configured-remote>/...
view rebuild scans actor logs from refs/remotes/<configured-remote>/...
synced main head prefers refs/remotes/<configured-remote>/<main-branch> when present
